description_long: This is an adult female figure dressed in a collared, long-sleeve blouse and a knee-length skirt, lying flat with arms relaxed at her sides. The figure's hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of the head, and the facial features are softly modeled. The hands are open and fingers slightly curved, with the legs extended and feet close together. The figure is wearing flat shoes with a simple design, and the overall build is slender and proportionate. The clothing appears formal, suitable for an office or professional urban environment. The surface of the figure is smooth and matte, with realistic anatomical proportions and subtle detailing in the clothing folds.
description: A formally dressed adult woman with a blouse, skirt, and bun hairstyle, lying flat with arms at her sides and wearing flat shoes. The figure has a smooth, matte finish and realistic proportions.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the back of the head with a bun, the back of the blouse, and the skirt, with both arms and legs visible.
description_view_1: Side profile view highlighting the facial features, the side of the blouse and skirt, and the flat shoes, with the figure lying on her back.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view showing the soles of the shoes, the underside of the skirt, and the face looking upward, with both arms and legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile view showing the other side of the face, blouse, skirt, and shoes, with the figure lying on her back.
attribute_posture: lying flat on back with arms at sides
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair styled in a bun
